channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Bryant says there was ‘absolutely nothing’ in Andrew documents to suggest ministers knew of his friendship with Epstein – UK politics live
item.description: Bryant says there was ‘absolutely nothing’ in Andrew documents to suggest ministers knew of his friendship with Epstein – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Manchester Messiah Burnham anointed to fix Westminster politics
item.description: Manchester Messiah Burnham anointed to fix Westminster politics

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Speaker scolds Labour ministers for making major announcements on TikTok before Parliament
item.description: Speaker scolds Labour ministers for making major announcements on TikTok before Parliament

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: BBC Politics: UK migration drops to 171,000 - almost half 2024's figure
item.description: UK migration drops to 171,000 - almost half 2024's figure

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Excellent and perceptive column by @robertshrimsley.bsky.social: Andy Burnham represents the last chance for the type of Labour coalition that Keir Starmer tried to build in 2024:
item.description: Excellent and perceptive column by @robertshrimsley.bsky.social: Andy Burnham represents the last chance for the type of Labour coalition that Keir Starmer tried to build in 2024:

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Note electoral reform is not the same as PR. Burnham has talked in the past about the benefits of using the supplementary vote system in mayoral elections but that's not a proportional system.
item.description: Note electoral reform is not the same as PR. Burnham has talked in the past about the benefits of using the supplementary vote system in mayoral elections but that's not a proportional system.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting floats ‘wealth tax’ in bid to woo Labour left
item.description: Streeting floats ‘wealth tax’ in bid to woo Labour left

item.title: BBC Politics: People in Britain can't afford a good life, Burnham says
item.description: People in Britain can't afford a good life, Burnham says

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham to back electoral reform if he becomes prime minister
item.description: Andy Burnham to back electoral reform if he becomes prime minister
